highlights.text: Intimate Munnar hill retreat with TRAGUIN Signature candlelit dinner in a private pavilion
Eravikulam National Park, Echo Point, and endless tea estate couple photography
Private luxury Alleppey houseboat full-board cruise on Vembanad Lake
Fort Kochi heritage walk — Chinese Fishing Nets, Jew Town & Dutch Palace
Honeymoon welcome amenities — floral bed decoration and sparkling juice
Private chauffeur-driven luxury vehicle with TRAGUIN 24/7 romance concierge

itinerary.title: Romantic Honeymoon — Munnar & Alleppey Houseboat
itinerary.tagline: Love in God's Own Country — Munnar Hills & Alleppey Backwaters
itinerary.overview: A captivating Kerala honeymoon weaving mist-kissed Munnar emerald hills with romantic Alleppey backwaters — private premium stays, TRAGUIN Signature candlelit dining, and seamless luxury transfers curated exclusively for newlyweds.
itinerary.seo_title: KL-005 | Romantic Honeymoon Kerala | TRAGUIN Munnar Alleppey Tour
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 04 Nights / 05 Days Kerala honeymoon package (KL-005) covering Munnar tea estates, private Alleppey houseboat, and Fort Kochi with premium romance experiences.

days.title: Cochin to Munnar — Welcome to the Emerald Hills
days.description: Upon arrival at Cochin International Airport, your luxury transport sweeps you toward Munnar through the Western Ghats. Stop at Cheeyappara and Valara waterfalls before arriving at your handpicked luxury resort with special honeymoon welcome amenities.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cheeyappara & Valara Waterfalls, Karadipara View Point, Scenic Mountain Highway Drive
Evening Experience: Private stroll through resort organic gardens followed by tailored multi-course dinner
Optional Activities: Evening traditional Kathakali or Kalaripayattu cultural performance
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Handpicked Premium Resort)

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing — Mist, Mountains & Romance
days.description: Explore Eravikulam National Park hand-in-hand, visit Mattupetty Dam and Kundala Lake, share a whisper at Echo Point, and capture photographs amidst endless green Tata Tea Estates.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, Kundala Lake, Photo Point, Tea Museum
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN Signature romantic candlelit dinner arranged in a private pavilion
Optional Activities: Guided premium tea tasting session or private couple's plantation trek
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Handpicked Premium Resort)

days.title: Munnar to Alleppey — Cruise of Eternal Togetherness
days.description: Descend toward Alleppey and step aboard an exclusive private luxury houseboat. Glide through palm-fringed canals and paddy fields as your onboard chef prepares hyper-local delicacies. Watch the golden sunset over the backwaters.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vembanad Lake cruising, Alleppey narrow backwater canals, local rural life viewing
Evening Experience: Relaxing on the open deck under stars; overnight anchoring in the serene heart of the lake
Optional Activities: Traditional village canoe ride through ultra-narrow canals for authentic photography
Overnight Stay: Alleppey (Premium Private Luxury Houseboat — Air Conditioned)

days.title: Alleppey to Cochin — Heritage & Coastal Luxury
days.description: Witness sunrise over the water as your houseboat glides back to the jetty. Discover Fort Cochin and Mattancherry — Chinese Fishing Nets, Paradesi Synagogue, and Mattancherry Dutch Palace before gourmet seafood dining.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Fort Cochin, Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church, Mattancherry Palace, Jew Town
Evening Experience: Gourmet dining at a renowned seafood specialty restaurant in Cochin
Optional Activities: Premium harbor sunset cruise or high-tea at a historical heritage waterfront hotel
Overnight Stay: Cochin (Premium Luxury Hotel)

days.title: Departure from Cochin
days.description: Savor your final coastal breakfast. Enjoy relaxed leisure or last-minute artisan souvenir shopping before your private transfer to Cochin International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Airport transit route viewing, optional brief stopovers for local spice purchases
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN farewell assistance and seamless airport check-in coordination
Overnight Stay: Not Applicable (Departure Day)
Meals Included: Breakfast

hotels.name: TRAGUIN Signature Elite Houseboat / Similar
hotels.description: Ultra Luxury stay in Alleppey Houseboat.

inclusions.text: Premium accommodation at handpicked Kerala resorts, heritage hotels, and luxury houseboats
Daily lavish breakfasts and authentic Kerala multi-cuisine dinners (MAPAI plan)
Private chauffeur-driven AC Innova Crysta for all transfers, hill stations, and sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated elite guest relationship manager assistance
Personalized welcome kit with herbal tea, fresh fruits, mineral water, and houseboat transfers where applicable
Driver allowances, tolls, parking, fuel, and applicable taxes
04 nights premium accommodation across Munnar, Alleppey houseboat, and Cochin
Honeymoon cake, floral bed decoration, and one exclusive candlelight dinner in Munnar
Airfare or train tickets to and from Cochin, Trivandrum, or Calicut gateway
Monument entry tickets, national park fees, camera fees, and optional guide gratuities
Optional activities such as speed-boating, elephant safaris, adventure sports, and spa therapies beyond included tier
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, alcoholic beverages, and tipping
